primary.name: Gold Detectors
primary.description: Professional gold prospecting equipment for alluvial and hard-rock deposits

secondary.name: Metal Detectors
secondary.description: General-purpose detectors for coin hunting, relic recovery, and beach detection — entry-level VLF to flagship multi-frequency.

secondary.name: Underground Imaging
secondary.description: Professional 3D ground scanners for archaeologists and survey teams who need to see below the surface before excavating.

secondary.name: Long Range Locators
secondary.description: Directional, frequency-adjustable systems for locating buried targets from a distance over large search areas.
